{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Grand Oath Array
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

''See also: [[Grand Oath Array Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Grand Oath [[Array]] is a highly sophisticated formation array and masterpiece originally created by the [[Rune Queen]] [[Emala]]. Historically, a [[Sage]] on the [[Path]] of the Last Oath utilized this array to defeat a rival [[Herald]] by sealing his family and [[Remnant]] within a prison. While the complete version was discovered by [[Northstrider]] centuries ago, he primarily viewed it as an object for academic research and used its underlying principles to assist in the design of pocket worlds. In its current state, the array is fragmented, with pieces and clues scattered throughout locations such as [[Shatterspine Castle]]. Reconstructing the array requires specific runes and a deep understanding of its complex mechanisms, which are difficult to unravel through force or standard [[scripts]]. When operated, the array involves spinning silver runes and requires intense concentration to manage its intricate interactions of authority, will, and [[scripts]]. It is capable of manipulating time and space, though its structural integrity can be compromised if it lacks [[madra]] to fuel itself.}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emala]] constructed her Grand Oath [[Array]] using runes derived from ancient sources. This powerful mechanism controls time and contains fragments of a [[Sage]]'s authority. Because of its complexity, even [[Heralds]] and [[Sages]] found the array's workings impossible to unravel. [[Emala]] ultimately utilized the Grand Oath [[Array]] to seal the castle.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Grand Oath Array]] controls time.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5">''Dreadgod'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emala]]'s [[Grand Oath Array]] was based on runes derived from the ancient runes.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Grand Oath Array]]'s working was impossible to unravel for [[Sages]] and [[Heralds]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emala]] used the [[Grand Oath Array]] to seal the castle.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Grand Oath Array]] contains pieces of [[Sage]]’s authority.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13">''Dreadgod'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Grand Oath [[Array]] is a time-warping masterpiece created by the [[Rune Queen]] that can be operated using a [[Path]]. To activate the array, [[Ziel]] manifests silver runes and steers the device to accelerate time or slow suffering. Because [[Ziel]] lacked sufficient [[madra]], the array was forced to burn its own structure to fuel itself. By the end of these events, [[Ziel]] has stowed the array, which remains in bad shape.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Grand Oath Array]] is an array that can be operated with a [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4">''Waybound'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ziel]] activated the [[Grand Oath Array]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7">''Waybound'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Grand Oath Array]] can accelerate time.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ziel]] manifests silver runes to activate the [[Grand Oath Array]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ziel]] steers a [[Grand Oath Array]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Grand Oath Array]] can be used to slow suffering.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c16">''Waybound'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ziel]] has a [[Grand Oath Array]] stowed.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Grand Oath Array]] is a time-warping array.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20">''Waybound'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Grand Oath Array]] was burning its own structure to fuel itself due to [[Ziel]]'s lack of [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Grand Oath Array]] is the [[Rune Queen]]’s masterpiece.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Grand Oath Array]] is in bad shape.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23">''Waybound'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel raised a hand. “The Grand Oath Array is in bad shape, unless you can repair it.”<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
